summary: Add multiline message composing for room chat, private messages, and group messages using Ctrl+Enter while preserving Enter-to-send.
root_cause: The rich composer intercepted Enter for send behavior and forwarded Ctrl+Enter to the hidden input, whose Enter handler still sent the message. The composer also advertised single-line behavior and did not provide a controlled newline insertion path.
fixes: Added a shared plain-Enter detection helper so modifier-enter does not send.
Ctrl+Enter, Cmd+Enter, and Shift+Enter now insert a real newline into the composer value.
Room, PM, and group send handlers now only send on unmodified Enter.
Rich composer BR nodes are translated to newline text for safer paste/browser handling.
